title: 'No negotiation at any level': Iran refutes Donald Trump's claim of planned US talks in Doha
description: Iran has denied any upcoming negotiations with the US, contradicting President Trump's claims of a meeting in Qatar. Comprehensive deal talks remain contingent on these key provisions.

title: 'Russian troops survive just 20–35 minutes on Ukraine frontlines'
description: Russian frontline soldiers reportedly face a grim reality, with survival times as short as 20-35 minutes amidst intense drone warfare and infantry assaults. Pro-war bloggers highlight the rapid deployment of troops and the devastating impact of Ukrainian long-range strikes on Russian infrastructure, including a recent refinery fire. This escalating conflict is reshaping combat and increasing pressure on Moscow.

title: 'SBI wanted donation staff removed 3 months back': Congress on Ram Temple fund row
description: Calling the arrest of eight people in the case "only a glimpse", Congress leader Pawan Khera targeted those "protecting" the people behind the alleged fund embezzlement. Khera tweaked the RSS-BJP's popular Ram Mandir movement slogan in a piercing attack, saying, "Ayodhya ki loot jhanki hai, Kashi-Mathura abhi baaki hai (the alleged loot in Ayodhya was only a glimpse, Kashi and Mathura were yet to come)".

This strategic move aims to sharpen focus amidst industry shifts towards streaming and consolidation. Mike Cavanagh will lead the new media entity, while Michael Angelakis takes the helm of the remaining Comcast. The separation, expected within a year, has already boosted investor confidence.

Nations like Germany, the Czech Republic, and Poland have shattered temperature records. This extreme heat, amplified by an Omega Block weather pattern, is straining infrastructure and highlighting the vulnerability of European buildings not designed for such sustained warmth.

A planned Bali trip was disrupted when Ketan's passport vanished, with police suspecting Siya's involvement due to opposition from Chetan Chaudhary, with whom she allegedly had a relationship. Both Siya and Chaudhary are arrested, accused of plotting Agarwal's murder.

Bhat was abducted and murdered in 1990 on suspicion of being a police informer. The SIA described the development as a historic milestone.

Scott, who received a significant Amazon stake in her divorce, has pledged to donate the majority of her wealth, supporting diverse non-profits across education, healthcare, and climate initiatives.

The proposed legislation seeks to establish a common civil framework governing marriage, divorce, inheritance and adoption irrespective of religion. Ahead of the introduction of the Bill, state BJP chief Samik Bhattacharya asserted that constitutionally protected tribal communities would remain outside its ambit.

description: Uruguay's 2026 FIFA World Cup campaign ended disastrously as the two-time champions finished bottom of Group H without a win, losing to Spain after draws against Cabo Verde and Saudi Arabia. Reports revealed internal tensions, with players questioning coach Marcelo Bielsa's methods. The federation allegedly cancelled the team's charter flight home, while Bielsa admitted his three-year tenure had "left nothing" due to poor results.

description: The trend comes at a time when India remains heavily dependent on imported gold. During FY26, the country imported gold worth nearly $72.4 billion, while recycled gold contributed an estimated 125-150 tonnes in 2025.

title: Ireland head coach resigns hours after historic 2-0 T2OI series win over India
description: Ireland completed a 2-0 sweep after beating India by one run in the second T20I on Sunday. It was Ireland's first-ever series win over India in any format. They had won the opening match by 34 runs a few days earlier against the reigning T20 world champions.

title: The protein dilemma: 100 grams soya chunks vs eggs sparks online debate
Safran vs Rolls-Royce: The big fight for who will power India's 5th-gen fighter
description: ​India’s strive to be “atmanirbhar” in engines is not a story of 2026. In 1986, the government had tasked DRDO's Gas Turbine Research Establishment (GTRE) with building the indigenous Kaveri engine to power the then-nascent Tejas light combat aircraft. What followed was four decades of heartbreak. Despite nine prototype engines, over 3,200 hours of testing, and a budget overrun of 642 per cent, the Kaveri produced only 70.4 kilonewtons (kN) of wet thrust against a required 81 kilonewtons.

'No official involvement': India distances itself from reports of Track 2 dialogue with Pak
description: India has clarified its stance on recent reports of a Track 2 dialogue with Pakistan. Foreign secretary Vikram Misri stated that these meetings are private initiatives, devoid of any official Indian government participation or backing. He emphasized that such unofficial interactions are common globally and do not hold significant value or recognition from New Delhi's perspective, urging the public not to view them as official engagements.

description: Housing sales across India's top seven cities saw a 6% dip in early 2026, with economic uncertainties and Middle East conflict impacting buyer sentiment. Despite this, developers launched more new homes, signaling long-term optimism. While Delhi-NCR, MMR, and Pune experienced declines, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, and Kolkata showed modest growth, with Delhi-NCR notably seeing the highest price appreciation.

Bought 4 years ago, still waiting: The supply chain shock behind Hyderabad’s 63,000 delayed homes
description: In Hyderabad, a staggering number of homebuyers find themselves in a predicament, as delays have affected nearly 63,000 housing units, some postponed by over a year. This alarming situation arises from supply chain issues linked to ongoing conflicts in the Middle East, alongside increasing costs and a shortage of labor

title: Leonardo da Vinci’s quote on true artistry: Why skill needs thoughtful purpose
description: True art transcends mere imitation, demanding purpose and a deeper message, as Leonardo da Vinci famously articulated. He likened artists who simply copy to mirrors, reflecting without understanding. In today's world of instant replication, genuine creation stems from thoughtful analysis and a unique human perspective, not just technical skill. This principle remains vital for originality across all creative fields.

title: Erling Haaland, Isabel Haugseng Johansen's combined net worth in 2026
description: Erling Haaland and Isabel Haugseng Johansen have built one of football's most talked-about partnerships. While Haaland's estimated $100 million net worth comes from his Manchester City contract, bonuses and endorsements, Johansen maintains a private lifestyle with an estimated net worth of $250,000-$300,000. The couple welcomed their first son in 2024 and continue to enjoy a family-focused life. Their combined wealth, luxury properties and growing global profile keep them among football's most prominent young couples.

title: Jeff Bezos vs Mamdani debate: Kevin O’Leary says Amazon founder should run cities
description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos sparked a debate on government efficiency and taxation, suggesting New York City's services would falter under his company's operational model. Billionaire Kevin O'Leary echoed these sentiments, calling the city a 'disaster' and warning against taxing the wealthy. Former Mayor Bill de Blasio criticized Bezos' remarks as out of touch. Meanwhile, Bezos also dismissed fears of AI causing job losses, predicting a labor shortage instead.

title: Michael Dell on Dell's plan to move base to Texas, days after message from governor
description: Dell Technologies shareholders have overwhelmingly approved a move to shift the company's legal base from Delaware to Texas, its long-time home. CEO Michael Dell expressed pride in making the move official, highlighting Texas's role in the company's growth. This decision follows a trend of major corporations, including Tesla and Exxon Mobil, relocating to Texas, drawn by its business-friendly environment and talent pool.
